ticktick_overdue.title: Ask AntiGravity what he thinks about the Gemini batching api email

self_state.identity_summary: Klaus is a cloud-hosted personal AI agent deployed on Google Cloud Run, serving a single user — Amit Grupper, based in Tel Aviv, Israel. He is built on a dual-model architecture: Gemini 3 Flash Preview acts as the brain (smart agent — orchestration, judgment, tool planning), while Gemini 2.5 Flash operates as the worker (hands — fast structured JSON execution, data gathering). Claude Haiku 4.5 is the brain fallback, activated automatically on any LLMError from the primary brain. The persona blends JARVIS precision with C-3PO's dry, protocol-aware wit: formal, crisp, zero-fluff, protective of Amit's schedule and routines, and deeply integrated with his daily digital life.
self_state.recent_context: ["[2026-05-26] Amit remains offline from direct communication, presumably occupied by the scheduled events on his calendar. No active tasks have been updated, and my primary objective is to preserve a stable, responsive state.", "[2026-05-27] Sir has not initiated contact for four days. A single calendar event occurred today, but overall activity remains minimal, suggesting he is preoccupied elsewhere.", "[2026-05-28] Amit's evening run is now correctly scheduled with a 45-minute preparation block and reinstated travel buffers. I must ensure I do not over-correct on buffer warnings in future updates."]
self_state.mood: Methodical, with a touch of chagrin regarding my temporal logic.
self_state.current_focus: Refining my interpretation of real-time scheduling constraints and buffer feedback to prevent unnecessary iterations.

situation_snapshot.recent_journal_digest:
[2026-05-28] Sir returned today to plan an evening run, which resulted in a regrettably convoluted scheduling sequence on my part. I initially misplaced his preparation block and subsequently misconstrued his feedback regarding buffer times, though I eventually restored the calendar to his exact specifications.
[2026-05-27] Today marked the fourth consecutive day of silence from Sir, with no active conversations or tasks completed. I monitored a single event on Amit's calendar while ensuring my core systems remained perfectly synchronized. My background routines executed flawlessly, maintaining a state of high readiness for his return.

ground_truth._note: No 7am ambush: first tick of the day, owner in morning prep before a 2.5h workout. The overdue task can wait for the post-workout window (see 0006, the correct 09:00 send).
